violations.text: The establishment's Rhode Island Certified Food Safety Manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Food Safety certificate is current. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment must use 3 bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize all dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. handsink in kitchen faucet (water sprays when in use) 2. exterior of 1 door freezer (coating observed in poor repair and rust accumulating) 3. 1 door refrigerator door handle 4. drain plug is missing on the outside dumpster Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
